enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about a lazy day in Boulder on March 7, 2016: sleeping until 11am, biking to his mom's house to pay rent, watching six episodes of the TV show Outlander with her, and working ahead on his website before an upcoming surgery that he expects will significantly cut his productivity.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: enjoys it and sees it as a pleasure
being an athlete who exercises helps you sleep better; looks forward to that
really good; plans to watch more episodes
concerned it will cut his writing/production output by at least 50%; wants to get as far ahead as possible beforehand
cherishes the remaining pre-surgery days of full output capacity
